settings.question: What warranty do you offer?
settings.answer: All our products come with a manufacturer warranty (duration varies by product — check the specs section). If you experience any defects in materials or workmanship during the warranty period, we'll repair or replace the item at no cost.

settings.question: How long does shipping take?
settings.answer: We ship 99% of orders within 1 business day. Standard US delivery takes 3–7 business days depending on your location. International shipping typically takes 7–14 business days. You'll receive a tracking number as soon as your order ships.

settings.question: What batteries are compatible with your inverters?
settings.answer: Our hybrid inverters work with 24V or 48V battery systems (depending on model) including lead-acid, AGM, gel, and LiFePO4 lithium batteries. For optimal performance, we recommend LiFePO4 batteries — check our Bundle options on each product page for pre-matched battery pairings.

settings.question: Can I use a solar inverter without batteries?
settings.answer: Yes — many of our hybrid inverters support battery-free operation, converting solar energy directly to AC output. This is a great cost-effective way to start with solar and add batteries later. Check the product specs for "Battery-free operation" compatibility.

settings.question: How do I choose the right power station or battery size?
settings.answer: It depends on what you need to power. As a rule of thumb: add up the wattage of devices you'll run simultaneously. A 1200W station handles phones, laptops, lights, and small appliances. A 2000W+ station can run fridges, power tools, and CPAP machines. For batteries, consider capacity in Ah — 100Ah at 12.8V gives you about 1,280Wh of usable energy. Contact us if you need help sizing your system.

settings.question: Do you offer returns and refunds?
settings.answer: Yes, we accept returns within 30 days of delivery for unused items in original packaging. Once we receive the return, we'll process your refund within 5 business days. Defective items are covered under warranty and can be returned at any time during the warranty period.

settings.question: Is it safe to ship LiFePO4 batteries?
settings.answer: Absolutely. LiFePO4 (lithium iron phosphate) is the safest lithium battery chemistry available — no risk of thermal runaway. All our batteries are UN38.3 certified for safe transport. We ship with damage-free guarantee packaging to ensure your battery arrives in perfect condition.
